collection_label_correction: The timestamped source session used the 868T20D label from the historical COM-port map; the operator subsequently confirmed the measured physical pair was E32-433T20D.

single_incomplete_transfer.diagnosis: One complete transparent-radio frame was not delivered; the PPK2 capture and its raw data are valid.

uart_observation.observation: A leading NUL byte is present in otherwise complete receiver responses after reset.
uart_observation.export_handling: Source data is preserved; only XML-illegal text characters are removed from XLSX cells.

notes: All requested radio-axis values were applied and verified through physical AT+CFG? readback.
Continuous RX loss is rate-dependent and nearly independent of requested peer TX power.
No repeat campaign or manual hardware diagnostic is required.
Requested TX power is a modem configuration value and is not a calibrated radiated-power measurement.
